figures.caption: Figure 2: Overview of the proposed APG cooperative driving framework. A) Equilibrium-secured system optimization: The system utility S is constructed from the individual utility u in a bottom-up manner such that the optimality of system utility becomes a sufficient condition for individual equilibrium. B) Individual feature adaptation: Each individual’s marginal contribution to the system utility is computed to quantify its influence φ. Afterward, by comparing the observed action of an individual with the APG-estimated action, the estimation of their decision preferences α and β is updated.
Figure 10: Vehicle trajectories and performance analysis controlled by the proposed APG framework.
